title: icacorea minima
intro: Icacorea minima is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the soapberry family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a traditional remedy for various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Icacorea minima include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Icacorea minima can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
